formulas.name: callCompleted
formulas.expression: "Call completed with " & {!AccountSelected.Name} & BR() & "Completed by: " & {!$User.FirstName} & " " & {!$User.LastName} & " at " & TEXT({!$Flow.CurrentDateTime} )

formulas.name: createIntel
formulas.expression: "Cyber Security Intlligence for " & {!AccountSelected.Name} & " has been created" & BR () & "Created by: " & {!$User.FirstName} & " " & {!$User.LastName} & " at " & TEXT({!$Flow.CurrentDateTime} )

formulas.name: descriptionNoContact
formulas.expression: "There is no contacts available for " & {!AccountSelected.Name} & ". Please update the system with a contact"

formulas.name: lineOfBusiness
formulas.expression: IF( OR({!$User.FirstName} = "Denise",{!$User.FirstName} = "Victoria"), "Cyber Security", "Unified Communications and Collaboration")

formulas.name: newContact
formulas.expression: "New contact has been created for " & {!AccountSelected.Name} & ": " & {!New_COntact.Name} & BR() & "Created by: " & {!$User.FirstName} & " " & {!$User.LastName} & " at " & TEXT({!$Flow.CurrentDateTime} )

formulas.name: noOppCreated
formulas.expression: "No Opportunity has been created for " & {!AccountSelected.Name} & " at " & TEXT({!$Flow.CurrentDateTime})

formulas.name: OppCreated
formulas.expression: "An opportunity for " & {!AccountSelected.Name} & " has been created for " & {!lineOfBusiness}

formulas.name: oppCreatedChatter
formulas.expression: {!lineOfBusiness} & " Opportunity has been created for " & {!AccountSelected.Name} & BR() & "Created by: " & {!$User.FirstName} & " " & {!$User.LastName} & " at " & TEXT({!$Flow.CurrentDateTime} )

formulas.name: updateContact
formulas.expression: "Contact has been updated for " & {!AccountSelected.Name} & ": " & {!Contact_Id.Name} & "." & BR() & "Updated by: " & {!$User.FirstName} & " " & {!$User.LastName} & " at " & TEXT({!$Flow.CurrentDateTime} )

formulas.name: updateIntel
formulas.expression: "Cyber Security Intlligence for " & {!AccountSelected.Name} & " has been updated" & BR () & "updated by: " & {!$User.FirstName} & " " & {!$User.LastName} & " at " & TEXT({!$Flow.CurrentDateTime} )

fields.name: Have_you_migrated_email_data_to_the_cloud
fields.fieldText: Have you migrated email data to the cloud

fields.name: Have_you_migrated_file_data_to_the_cloud
fields.fieldText: Have you migrated file data to the cloud

fields.name: Who_do_you_purchase_you_Microsoft_licences_through
fields.fieldText: Who do you purchase you Microsoft licences through

fields.name: What_agreement_are_you_on_for_Microsoft_licences
fields.fieldText: What agreement are you on for Microsoft licences

fields.name: When_was_the_last_time_your_supplier_ran_a_licence_healthcheck
fields.fieldText: When was the last time your supplier ran a licence healthcheck?

fields.name: When_was_the_last_time_your_supplier_ran_a_server_licence_healthcheck
fields.fieldText: When was the last time your supplier ran a server licence healthcheck, to ensure you are licences correctly?

fields.name: Do_you_plan_to_migrate_these_services_to_the_Cloud
fields.fieldText: Do you plan to migrate these services to the Cloud?

fields.name: Do_you_host_any_services_in_the_public_private_cloud
fields.fieldText: Do you host any services in the public/private cloud

fields.name: When_was_the_last_time_your_partner_ran_a_healthcheck_on_your_cloud_environment
fields.fieldText: When was the last time your partner ran a healthcheck on your cloud environment?

fields.name: Do_you_use_a_CRM_System
fields.fieldText: Do you use a CRM System

fields.name: Do_you_use_Teams_for_internal_calling
fields.fieldText: Do you use Teams for internal calling?

fields.name: Have_you_expored_using_Teams_for_in_bound_and_out_bound_calling
fields.fieldText: Have you expored using Teams for in-bound and out-bound calling?

fields.name: ErrorMessage
fields.fieldText: OI!!!! You need to select a contact to update

fields.name: Have_you_explored_a_cloud_hosted_phone_system
fields.fieldText: Have you explored a cloud hosted phone system?

fields.name: ContactCentreIntegration
fields.fieldText: Does it Integrate with Phone System?

fields.name: Does_it_Integrate_with_Phone_System
fields.fieldText: Does it Integrate with Phone System?

fields.name: Call_Recording_Does_it_Integrate_with_Phone_System
fields.fieldText: Does it Integrate with Phone System?
